name: TIDEWATER INC
business: Tidewater Inc. provides marine and transportation services to the global offshore energy industry, operating a fleet of 208 offshore service vessels and related support vessels as of December 31, 2025.

exposures.sentence: Our vessels and associated services support all phases of offshore crude oil and natural gas (also referred to as oil and gas) exploration, field development, production and maintenance, as well as windfarm development and maintenance activities.

Our vessels and associated services support all phases of offshore crude oil and natural gas (also referred to as oil and gas) exploration, field development, production and maintenance, as well as windfarm development and maintenance activities.

catalysts.sentence: On February 22, 2026, we entered into a definitive agreement to acquire all outstanding shares of Wilson Sons Ultratug Participa es S.A and its affiliate Atlantic Offshore Services S.A. ... The transaction is subject to customary closing conditions, including approval from the Brazilian Antitrust Authority and the consent of the lenders to the Wilson Companies, and is expected to close late in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Delivery of two ocean going tugs and eight crew boats
catalysts.sentence: We signed agreements for the construction of two ocean going tugs and eight crew boats, all of which have been delivered as of December 31, 2025.
